questions.question: A shirt originally costs $40. It is on sale for 25% off. What is the sale price?
A restaurant bill is $50. You want to leave a 20% tip. How much is the tip?
Last year, a store sold 200 units. This year, it sold 250 units. What is the percent increase in units sold?
A video game costs $60 before tax. The sales tax is 10%. What is the total price after tax?
A pair of shoes is discounted by 30%. If the original price is $80, what is the discount amount in dollars?
If a quantity decreases from 120 to 90, what is the percent decrease?
